import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { mockRestaurants } from '../data/mockData'; const SimpleHome = () => { // Use mock data directly instead of API calls const featuredRestaurants = mockRestaurants.slice(0, 6); return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Delicious Food from Tamil Nadu

Order from the best restaurants in Chennai, Madurai, Coimbatore & more

Browse Restaurants
{/* Popular Cuisines */}

Popular Cuisines

{[ { name: 'South Indian', emoji: '🍛', count: '50+ dishes' }, { name: 'Chettinad', emoji: '🌶️', count: '30+ dishes' }, { name: 'Multi Cuisine', emoji: '🍽️', count: '40+ dishes' }, { name: 'North Indian', emoji: '🍛', count: '25+ dishes' }, { name: 'Chinese', emoji: '🥢', count: '20+ dishes' }, { name: 'Beverages', emoji: '☕', count: '15+ drinks' } ].map((cuisine) => (
{cuisine.emoji}

{cuisine.name}

{cuisine.count}

))}
{/* Featured Restaurants */}

Featured Restaurants

{featuredRestaurants.map((restaurant) => (

{restaurant.name}

⭐ {restaurant.rating}

{restaurant.cuisine}

{restaurant.city}, {restaurant.area}

{restaurant.deliveryTime} ₹{restaurant.deliveryFee} delivery
))}
View All Restaurants ({mockRestaurants.length})
{/* Quick Stats */}
{mockRestaurants.length}+
Restaurants
200+
Dishes
6
Cities
30 min
Avg Delivery
); }; export default SimpleHome;
